evals.prompt: Create a new app network: segment app-web on 10.10.1.0/24 with a Tier-1 gateway and SNAT to 172.16.0.10
evals.expected_output: Segment, gateway, and NAT rule created
expectations: Uses create_nat_rule with SNAT action and correct IPs

evals.prompt: List all network segments and check if any transport nodes are down
evals.expected_output: Segment list and transport node health
expectations: Uses list_transport_nodes or get_transport_node_status for health

evals.prompt: Troubleshoot why VM app-01 can't reach the internet - check its segment, gateway, and NAT
evals.expected_output: Network path analysis from VM to internet
expectations: Uses get_segment_port_for_vm to find VM's segment
Checks NAT rules on the Tier-1 gateway
